purpose: Trace B07 mutation/evidence/audit/e-sign control to B08 requirement, protocol, executed evidence, deviation handling and release-readiness gate
owner: Domain Owner + QA Validation Lead for regulated tenant escalation
trigger: regulated or conditionally regulated mutation/event/control from B07 crosswalk
intended_use: Operate Customer Master as commercial/supply chain authority; escalate validation scope when it gates regulated execution or quality decisions
GxP_impact: Operational impact by default; conditional GxP impact when used to gate regulated product, supplier, shipment, customer hold, recall, or complaint evidence
risk_class: VPL-2 non-GxP by default; VPL-3 conditional when linked to regulated product/customer/supplier hold
evidence_required: B07 evidence object=B07-EV-002 state transition evidence packet + command-specific evidence from source transition matrix; evidence source=customer identity uniqueness; site/ship-to/bill-to completeness; payment/terms authority; tax/export/compliance check; duplicate/alias review; active owner; expected version; reason and evidence refs; audit=CUST_APPROVE_CUSTOMER_MASTER_AUDIT; signature/rationale=Not required by default for non-regulated commercial approval; approval meaning and reason are audit-recorded. Escalate to e-sign if policy marks root/tenant regulated.; test evidence=trace command to evidence refs, audit event, state transition, signature/rationale, SOD check, reason-for-change, idempotency and correction path
deviation_handling: Any failed guard/evidence/audit/signature/SOD/retention/reason-for-change/idempotency expectation becomes validation deviation; critical/major rows require QA disposition and retest or explicit restriction.
change_control_required: yes for mutation semantics, workflow state, signature meaning, audit event, evidence object, retention class, API/problem contract, frontend action surface, SOD rule or root contract changes
periodic_review_need: conditional; PR-1 by default, PR-2/PR-3 when linked to regulated tenant controls
release_gate: VRG-03 risk screen + conditional VRG-06 control verification
rollback_or_restriction: apply restriction register: disable command, read-only, no e-sign/no release/no disposition, tenant-level feature flag off, or rollback to last controlled baseline
stop_rule: block commercial commitment if customer is inactive, duplicate, held, missing ship-to/bill-to, or terms/compliance authority is unresolved
notes: B07 crosswalk_id=B07-XW-001; source_prompt=B02; source_file=B02_TRANSITION_MATRIX.csv. Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.
B07_signature_meaning: Not required by default for non-regulated commercial approval; approval meaning and reason are audit-recorded. Escalate to e-sign if policy marks root/tenant regulated.
B07_SOD_rule: apply B07_SOD_AND_REASON_FOR_CHANGE_MATRIX.csv by root/command risk; enforce independent review for release/disposition/closure/critical correction
test_case_pattern: positive command path + negative guard tests + unauthorized/SOD test + stale state/idempotency test + audit/evidence/signature retrieval + correction/reversal check where applicable
acceptance_criteria: Expected state/control outcome matches requirement; audit trail and evidence refs are reconstructable; signature meaning/rationale present where required; no hidden authority or uncontrolled mutation; rejected paths fail safely.
M03_M04_handoff: M03 to merge API/frontend/workflow trace; M04 to finalize validation/standards/retention thresholds

trigger: regulated or conditionally regulated mutation/event/control from B07 crosswalk
intended_use: Govern controlled use of Inventory Transaction where record changes can affect product quality, data integrity, release eligibility, or regulated process execution
GxP_impact: Direct or conditional GxP impact: production/quality master data, execution, inspection, genealogy, equipment, training, or supplier quality control
risk_class: VPL-4 direct/conditional GxP controlled mutation package
evidence_required: B07 evidence object=B07-EV-002 state transition evidence packet + command-specific evidence from source transition matrix; evidence source=source document authorized; from/to location valid; lot/serial status permits movement; quantity/UOM valid; cost/valuation snapshot available if required; reason code; expected version; audit=INVTXN_APPROVE_INVENTORY_ADJUSTMENT_AUDIT; signature/rationale=Not required by default for non-regulated commercial approval; approval meaning and reason are audit-recorded. Escalate to e-sign if policy marks root/tenant regulated.; test evidence=trace command to evidence refs, audit event, state transition, signature/rationale, SOD check, reason-for-change, idempotency and correction path
deviation_handling: Any failed guard/evidence/audit/signature/SOD/retention/reason-for-change/idempotency expectation becomes validation deviation; critical/major rows require QA disposition and retest or explicit restriction.
change_control_required: yes for mutation semantics, workflow state, signature meaning, audit event, evidence object, retention class, API/problem contract, frontend action surface, SOD rule or root contract changes
periodic_review_need: required; periodic review class PR-2/PR-3 depending on regulated tenant enablement
release_gate: VRG-07 protocol evidence complete + VRG-08 validation summary reviewed
rollback_or_restriction: apply restriction register: disable command, read-only, no e-sign/no release/no disposition, tenant-level feature flag off, or rollback to last controlled baseline
stop_rule: block posting if source authority, lot status, location, quantity, reason code, or correction/reversal policy is missing
notes: B07 crosswalk_id=B07-XW-049; source_prompt=B02; source_file=B02_TRANSITION_MATRIX.csv. Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.
B07_signature_meaning: Not required by default for non-regulated commercial approval; approval meaning and reason are audit-recorded. Escalate to e-sign if policy marks root/tenant regulated.
B07_SOD_rule: apply B07_SOD_AND_REASON_FOR_CHANGE_MATRIX.csv by root/command risk; enforce independent review for release/disposition/closure/critical correction
test_case_pattern: positive command path + negative guard tests + unauthorized/SOD test + stale state/idempotency test + audit/evidence/signature retrieval + correction/reversal check where applicable
acceptance_criteria: Expected state/control outcome matches requirement; audit trail and evidence refs are reconstructable; signature meaning/rationale present where required; no hidden authority or uncontrolled mutation; rejected paths fail safely.
M03_M04_handoff: M03 to merge API/frontend/workflow trace; M04 to finalize validation/standards/retention thresholds

trigger: regulated or conditionally regulated mutation/event/control from B07 crosswalk
intended_use: Govern controlled use of Lot/Batch where record changes can affect product quality, data integrity, release eligibility, or regulated process execution
GxP_impact: Direct or conditional GxP impact: production/quality master data, execution, inspection, genealogy, equipment, training, or supplier quality control
risk_class: VPL-4 direct/conditional GxP controlled mutation package
evidence_required: B07 evidence object=B07-EV-002 state transition evidence packet + command-specific evidence from source transition matrix; evidence source=lot identity unique; item/revision/status/location known; genealogy source refs; quality status; hold/release authorization; split/merge quantity balance; expected version; audit=LOT_RELEASE_LOT_HOLD_AUDIT; signature/rationale=Required when regulated/GxP material: I authorize the displayed hold/release/disposition using the shown evidence snapshot.; test evidence=trace command to evidence refs, audit event, state transition, signature/rationale, SOD check, reason-for-change, idempotency and correction path
deviation_handling: Any failed guard/evidence/audit/signature/SOD/retention/reason-for-change/idempotency expectation becomes validation deviation; critical/major rows require QA disposition and retest or explicit restriction.
change_control_required: yes for mutation semantics, workflow state, signature meaning, audit event, evidence object, retention class, API/problem contract, frontend action surface, SOD rule or root contract changes
periodic_review_need: required; periodic review class PR-2/PR-3 depending on regulated tenant enablement
release_gate: VRG-07 protocol evidence complete + VRG-08 validation summary reviewed
rollback_or_restriction: apply restriction register: disable command, read-only, no e-sign/no release/no disposition, tenant-level feature flag off, or rollback to last controlled baseline
stop_rule: block availability/allocation/shipment/consumption if lot identity, genealogy, status, quantity balance, or hold/release evidence is unresolved
notes: B07 crosswalk_id=B07-XW-059; source_prompt=B02; source_file=B02_TRANSITION_MATRIX.csv. Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.
B07_signature_meaning: Required when regulated/GxP material: I authorize the displayed hold/release/disposition using the shown evidence snapshot.
B07_SOD_rule: apply B07_SOD_AND_REASON_FOR_CHANGE_MATRIX.csv by root/command risk; enforce independent review for release/disposition/closure/critical correction
test_case_pattern: positive command path + negative guard tests + unauthorized/SOD test + stale state/idempotency test + audit/evidence/signature retrieval + correction/reversal check where applicable
acceptance_criteria: Expected state/control outcome matches requirement; audit trail and evidence refs are reconstructable; signature meaning/rationale present where required; no hidden authority or uncontrolled mutation; rejected paths fail safely.
M03_M04_handoff: M03 to merge API/frontend/workflow trace; M04 to finalize validation/standards/retention thresholds

intended_use: Govern controlled use of Quarantine where record changes can affect product quality, data integrity, release eligibility, or regulated process execution
GxP_impact: Direct or conditional GxP impact: production/quality master data, execution, inspection, genealogy, equipment, training, or supplier quality control
risk_class: VPL-4 direct/conditional GxP controlled mutation package
evidence_required: B07 evidence object=B07-EV-002 state transition evidence packet + command-specific evidence from source transition matrix; evidence source=source receipt/lot/quality event exists; hold reason; material identity/status/location; QA owner; disposition path; release/reject evidence; expected version; audit=QUARANTINE_APPROVE_REJECT_OR_SCRAP_AUDIT; signature/rationale=Required when regulated/GxP material: I authorize the displayed hold/release/disposition using the shown evidence snapshot.; test evidence=trace command to evidence refs, audit event, state transition, signature/rationale, SOD check, reason-for-change, idempotency and correction path
deviation_handling: Any failed guard/evidence/audit/signature/SOD/retention/reason-for-change/idempotency expectation becomes validation deviation; critical/major rows require QA disposition and retest or explicit restriction.
change_control_required: yes for mutation semantics, workflow state, signature meaning, audit event, evidence object, retention class, API/problem contract, frontend action surface, SOD rule or root contract changes
periodic_review_need: required; periodic review class PR-2/PR-3 depending on regulated tenant enablement
release_gate: VRG-07 protocol evidence complete + VRG-08 validation summary reviewed
rollback_or_restriction: apply restriction register: disable command, read-only, no e-sign/no release/no disposition, tenant-level feature flag off, or rollback to last controlled baseline
stop_rule: block release/reject/close if source identity, disposition owner, quality decision, qty balance, or evidence/signature threshold is unresolved

B07_SOD_rule: apply B07_SOD_AND_REASON_FOR_CHANGE_MATRIX.csv by root/command risk; enforce independent review for release/disposition/closure/critical correction
test_case_pattern: positive command path + negative guard tests + unauthorized/SOD test + stale state/idempotency test + audit/evidence/signature retrieval + correction/reversal check where applicable
acceptance_criteria: Expected state/control outcome matches requirement; audit trail and evidence refs are reconstructable; signature meaning/rationale present where required; no hidden authority or uncontrolled mutation; rejected paths fail safely.
M03_M04_handoff: M03 to merge API/frontend/workflow trace; M04 to finalize validation/standards/retention thresholds

trigger: regulated or conditionally regulated mutation/event/control from B07 crosswalk
intended_use: Operational management of Material Requirements Planning; remain outside regulated validation scope until linked to regulated intended use
GxP_impact: No direct GxP impact identified in P0; validate only if tenant/use-case binds it to regulated predicate record or controlled workflow
risk_class: VPL-1 non-GxP operational planning/control package
evidence_required: B07 evidence object=B07-EV-002 state transition evidence packet + command-specific evidence from source transition matrix; evidence source=requirements approval pack, exception disposition, make/buy split; current state token; source version/effectivity; open hold check; duplicate command/idempotency check; audit context.; audit=mrp.approve_requirements; signature/rationale=E-sign meaning: Material Planning Lead confirms APPROVE_REQUIREMENTS for root MRP; signer meaning, timestamp and record binding required when regulated or site policy applies.; test evidence=trace command to evidence refs, audit event, state transition, signature/rationale, SOD check, reason-for-change, idempotency and correction path
deviation_handling: Any failed guard/evidence/audit/signature/SOD/retention/reason-for-change/idempotency expectation becomes validation deviation; critical/major rows require QA disposition and retest or explicit restriction.
change_control_required: yes for mutation semantics, workflow state, signature meaning, audit event, evidence object, retention class, API/problem contract, frontend action surface, SOD rule or root contract changes
periodic_review_need: PR-0/PR-1; review on material change or regulated-scope expansion
release_gate: VRG-02 intended-use and GxP impact screen complete
rollback_or_restriction: apply restriction register: disable command, read-only, no e-sign/no release/no disposition, tenant-level feature flag off, or rollback to last controlled baseline
stop_rule: Stop if the command can change authority without actor, current state token, guard evidence, audit event, business event, exception path and rollback/compensation.
notes: B07 crosswalk_id=B07-XW-099; source_prompt=B03; source_file=B03_TRANSITION_MATRIX.csv. Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.
B07_signature_meaning: E-sign meaning: Material Planning Lead confirms APPROVE_REQUIREMENTS for root MRP; signer meaning, timestamp and record binding required when regulated or site policy applies.
B07_SOD_rule: apply B07_SOD_AND_REASON_FOR_CHANGE_MATRIX.csv by root/command risk; enforce independent review for release/disposition/closure/critical correction
test_case_pattern: positive command path + negative guard tests + unauthorized/SOD test + stale state/idempotency test + audit/evidence/signature retrieval + correction/reversal check where applicable
acceptance_criteria: Expected state/control outcome matches requirement; audit trail and evidence refs are reconstructable; signature meaning/rationale present where required; no hidden authority or uncontrolled mutation; rejected paths fail safely.
M03_M04_handoff: M03 to merge API/frontend/workflow trace; M04 to finalize validation/standards/retention thresholds

trigger: regulated or conditionally regulated mutation/event/control from B07 crosswalk
intended_use: Operational management of Kit; remain outside regulated validation scope until linked to regulated intended use
GxP_impact: No direct GxP impact identified in P0; validate only if tenant/use-case binds it to regulated predicate record or controlled workflow
risk_class: VPL-1 non-GxP operational planning/control package
evidence_required: B07 evidence object=B07-EV-002 state transition evidence packet + command-specific evidence from source transition matrix; evidence source=shortage evidence, affected WO/dispatch row, expected resolution; current state token; source version/effectivity; open hold check; duplicate command/idempotency check; audit context.; audit=kit.place_kit_shortage_hold; signature/rationale=E-sign meaning: Warehouse Lead confirms PLACE_KIT_SHORTAGE_HOLD for root KIT; signer meaning, timestamp and record binding required when regulated or site policy applies.; test evidence=trace command to evidence refs, audit event, state transition, signature/rationale, SOD check, reason-for-change, idempotency and correction path
deviation_handling: Any failed guard/evidence/audit/signature/SOD/retention/reason-for-change/idempotency expectation becomes validation deviation; critical/major rows require QA disposition and retest or explicit restriction.
change_control_required: yes for mutation semantics, workflow state, signature meaning, audit event, evidence object, retention class, API/problem contract, frontend action surface, SOD rule or root contract changes
periodic_review_need: PR-0/PR-1; review on material change or regulated-scope expansion
release_gate: VRG-02 intended-use and GxP impact screen complete
rollback_or_restriction: apply restriction register: disable command, read-only, no e-sign/no release/no disposition, tenant-level feature flag off, or rollback to last controlled baseline
stop_rule: Stop if the command can change authority without actor, current state token, guard evidence, audit event, business event, exception path and rollback/compensation.
notes: B07 crosswalk_id=B07-XW-138; source_prompt=B03; source_file=B03_TRANSITION_MATRIX.csv. Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.
B07_signature_meaning: E-sign meaning: Warehouse Lead confirms PLACE_KIT_SHORTAGE_HOLD for root KIT; signer meaning, timestamp and record binding required when regulated or site policy applies.
B07_SOD_rule: apply B07_SOD_AND_REASON_FOR_CHANGE_MATRIX.csv by root/command risk; enforce independent review for release/disposition/closure/critical correction
test_case_pattern: positive command path + negative guard tests + unauthorized/SOD test + stale state/idempotency test + audit/evidence/signature retrieval + correction/reversal check where applicable
acceptance_criteria: Expected state/control outcome matches requirement; audit trail and evidence refs are reconstructable; signature meaning/rationale present where required; no hidden authority or uncontrolled mutation; rejected paths fail safely.
M03_M04_handoff: M03 to merge API/frontend/workflow trace; M04 to finalize validation/standards/retention thresholds

trigger: regulated or conditionally regulated mutation/event/control from B07 crosswalk
intended_use: Govern controlled use of Work Order where record changes can affect product quality, data integrity, release eligibility, or regulated process execution
GxP_impact: Direct or conditional GxP impact: production/quality master data, execution, inspection, genealogy, equipment, training, or supplier quality control
risk_class: VPL-4 direct/conditional GxP controlled mutation package
evidence_required: B07 evidence object=B07-EV-002 state transition evidence packet + command-specific evidence from source transition matrix; evidence source=minor variance policy, acceptance reason, customer/regulatory impact check; current state token; source version/effectivity; open hold check; duplicate command/idempotency check; audit context.; audit=wo.accept_minor_variance; signature/rationale=E-sign meaning: Operations Manager confirms ACCEPT_MINOR_VARIANCE for root WO; signer meaning, timestamp and record binding required when regulated or site policy applies.; test evidence=trace command to evidence refs, audit event, state transition, signature/rationale, SOD check, reason-for-change, idempotency and correction path
deviation_handling: Any failed guard/evidence/audit/signature/SOD/retention/reason-for-change/idempotency expectation becomes validation deviation; critical/major rows require QA disposition and retest or explicit restriction.
change_control_required: yes for mutation semantics, workflow state, signature meaning, audit event, evidence object, retention class, API/problem contract, frontend action surface, SOD rule or root contract changes
periodic_review_need: required; periodic review class PR-2/PR-3 depending on regulated tenant enablement
release_gate: VRG-07 protocol evidence complete + VRG-08 validation summary reviewed
rollback_or_restriction: apply restriction register: disable command, read-only, no e-sign/no release/no disposition, tenant-level feature flag off, or rollback to last controlled baseline
stop_rule: Stop if the command can change authority without actor, current state token, guard evidence, audit event, business event, exception path and rollback/compensation.
notes: B07 crosswalk_id=B07-XW-235; source_prompt=B03; source_file=B03_TRANSITION_MATRIX.csv. Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.
B07_signature_meaning: E-sign meaning: Operations Manager confirms ACCEPT_MINOR_VARIANCE for root WO; signer meaning, timestamp and record binding required when regulated or site policy applies.
B07_SOD_rule: apply B07_SOD_AND_REASON_FOR_CHANGE_MATRIX.csv by root/command risk; enforce independent review for release/disposition/closure/critical correction
test_case_pattern: positive command path + negative guard tests + unauthorized/SOD test + stale state/idempotency test + audit/evidence/signature retrieval + correction/reversal check where applicable
acceptance_criteria: Expected state/control outcome matches requirement; audit trail and evidence refs are reconstructable; signature meaning/rationale present where required; no hidden authority or uncontrolled mutation; rejected paths fail safely.
M03_M04_handoff: M03 to merge API/frontend/workflow trace; M04 to finalize validation/standards/retention thresholds

trigger: regulated or conditionally regulated mutation/event/control from B07 crosswalk
intended_use: Control and evidence for Manufacturing Deviation; electronic record relied upon for regulated manufacturing/quality decisions where tenant scope applies
GxP_impact: Direct GxP impact: quality decision, regulated electronic record/signature, release/disposition, or validation evidence authority
risk_class: VPL-5 critical GxP release/disposition/e-record/e-sign package
evidence_required: B07 evidence object=B07-EV-002 state transition evidence packet + command-specific evidence from source transition matrix; evidence source=record identity; current state token; actor role; SoD check; required evidence links; audit context; reason code; audit=DEVIATION.EXPIRE_DEVIATION.audit; signature/rationale=QA acknowledges deviation expiry and required follow-up for open work; test evidence=trace command to evidence refs, audit event, state transition, signature/rationale, SOD check, reason-for-change, idempotency and correction path
deviation_handling: Any failed guard/evidence/audit/signature/SOD/retention/reason-for-change/idempotency expectation becomes validation deviation; critical/major rows require QA disposition and retest or explicit restriction.
change_control_required: yes for mutation semantics, workflow state, signature meaning, audit event, evidence object, retention class, API/problem contract, frontend action surface, SOD rule or root contract changes
periodic_review_need: required; periodic review class PR-3/PR-4 depending on site/product predicate rule
release_gate: VRG-08 validation summary + QA release-readiness approval + open deviation disposition
rollback_or_restriction: apply restriction register: disable command, read-only, no e-sign/no release/no disposition, tenant-level feature flag off, or rollback to last controlled baseline
stop_rule: stop if command cannot name actor, state, guard evidence, e-sign meaning/rationale, audit event, correction path
notes: B07 crosswalk_id=B07-XW-457; source_prompt=B05; source_file=B05_EQMS_TRANSITION_MATRIX.csv. Repo MOM GitHub not checked by user instruction; current repo state is treated as unverified.
B07_signature_meaning: QA acknowledges deviation expiry and required follow-up for open work
B07_SOD_rule: apply B07_SOD_AND_REASON_FOR_CHANGE_MATRIX.csv by root/command risk; enforce independent review for release/disposition/closure/critical correction
test_case_pattern: positive command path + negative guard tests + unauthorized/SOD test + stale state/idempotency test + audit/evidence/signature retrieval + correction/reversal check where applicable
acceptance_criteria: Expected state/control outcome matches requirement; audit trail and evidence refs are reconstructable; signature meaning/rationale present where required; no hidden authority or uncontrolled mutation; rejected paths fail safely.
M03_M04_handoff: M03 to merge API/frontend/workflow trace; M04 to finalize validation/standards/retention thresholds
